prompt: A photorealistic close-up of a hand holding a modern black smartphone vertically in a cozy sunlit cafe. The phone screen shows the live camera view in photo mode, with a young woman seated at a table and leaning forward, extending an orange plate toward the camera with both hands. On the plate is 1 seeded cream-filled pastry or bagel-like sandwich topped with mixed sesame and poppy seeds and a dusting of sugar. The woman has shoulder-length dark brown hair, small gold hoop earrings, a light-colored baseball cap with NYC lettering, and a faded mauve-pink ringer T-shirt with darker trim and partially visible vintage text. Her face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur block centered over it. The smartphone camera UI is clearly visible: 1 flash icon at top left, 1 target or focus icon at top right, and along the bottom 5 mode labels reading SLO-MO, VIDEO, PHOTO, PORTRAIT, and PANO, with PHOTO highlighted in yellow; include 1 large white shutter button, 1 small gallery thumbnail at bottom left, and 1 camera-switch icon at bottom right. Outside the phone, add playful floating food-themed stickers around the scene: 1 waffle at the upper left, 1 pink heart sticker reading YUMMY on the left, 1 yellow smiling face emoji on the left, 1 blue speech bubble at the upper right reading Yummy!, 1 small yellow smiley on the right, 2 white sparkle stars at the upper right, 1 silver fork at the lower right, and 1 cherry sticker at the lower right. The real cafe background outside the phone is softly blurred with warm wood tones, chairs, tables, large windows, and on the right side of the table 1 red apple and 1 plate of waffles with berries. Emphasize shallow depth of field, natural daylight, glossy phone reflections, realistic skin texture, and a trendy candid social-media food photo aesthetic.
